title: Processed Single Cell RNA sequencing/TCR sequencing/BCR sequencing data of 17 ICC patients
author: Zhou, Chi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains the processed Single Cell RNA sequencing/TCR sequencing/BCR sequencing data of 17 ICC patients (9 WithTLS  versus 8 NoTLS) generated in the manuscript titled "Mature Tertiary Lymphoid Structures Fuel Stem-like CD8 T Cells to Boost Anti-Tumor Immunity in Intrahepatic Cholangiocarcinoma."
steps_raw: This dataset contains the processed Single Cell RNA sequencing/TCR sequencing/BCR sequencing data of 17 ICC patients (9 WithTLS  versus 8 NoTLS) generated in the manuscript titled "Mature Tertiary Lymphoid Structures Fuel Stem-like CD8 T Cells to Boost Anti-Tumor Immunity in Intrahepatic Cholangiocarcinoma."
